entry.title: Re: to unlock the locked group material data
entry.content:
Please check Tcode . SM12... you can see there the locks on SAP Objects and clear them out.

Reward.

Lalit Nagar

entry.title: Re: Custom Compliance Form setup - anyone used this yet?
entry.content:
@Niladri_B_Nayak 

We would use it for moving the Custom Forms Signing step to a parallel process to avoid this step blocking for the User Data to flow to MPH for further processing.
My understanding is that utilizing Custom Compliance Forms instead of the standard Document Flow step would do just this, and still have e-signing with DocuSign etc running in its own process similar to the Standard Compliance Processes that comes out of the box.

Can you verify this please?

Are there any limitation to number of dynamic data fields etc for Custom Compliance Forms or other limitations we need to be aware of?

Really appreciate your input on this - thanks.

entry.title: Re: grouping radio buttons on screen painter
entry.content: This solved for me when adding a new one to existing ones. Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Food for thought: What’s your favorite holiday dish?
entry.content:
@MariettaLopez  Thank a lot for sharing:)! I was imagining the dishes as I was reading your comment. Thank you!:) It was delicious 🙂

Before university I was working in a ski resort in the states and I was invited to a Thanksgiving dinner and I loved the Turkey and gravy sauce they served:). If you happen to have pictures of the dishes, I would love to see them:).

Happy new year:)

entry.title: Re: There's nothing to show yet - Compensation Portlet
entry.content:
Hi @angelosuano 

I did see https://me.sap.com/notes/3542411 you shared with me in KBA and am checking with my colleagues from Product.

In the meantime can you please help with the following: 

  • confirm whether what is in KBA (PCG design) applies to your environment ?
  • share screenshots of each page for the design of this tile (assuming it's a custom one similar to the one I built in this blog)
  • is this a new tile you just created or did it work before ?
  • share a screenshot of the salary review template Summary section in admin center (where we can how many forms are in each step).

Often this happens if there are no forms launched for the template, or if they are all completed, or if there is simply a bad design of the tile. I believe there is more information in the blog linked above.

All the best

Xavier

entry.title: Re: CREATE button is not appearing after deployed Fiori A...
entry.content: @saurabh__khare : HI, I was able to see the Create Button in deployed application but another problem is when i click on CREATE button it is not navigating to Next Object Page

entry.title: Re: CTMS Transport fails
entry.content:
Hi @Sandhya2 ,

Sorry to hear that you are facing issues with the deployment!

As you might know, "Check Connection" does not always provide meaningful results for destinations using OAuth2Password authentication, but as it does fit to the deploy error, this does not apply here.

Just to make sure: as it did work with another user, I am sure that the URL does fit to the following convention:
https://deploy-service.cf.eu10-004.hana.ondemand.com/slprot/977a24d6-2eaf-432d-a3e1-5294451551a3/slp
(as often, "/slp" is missing), correct?

The user also has to fulfill the following prerequisites (as listed in Creating Destinations Using SAP Cloud Deployment Service with OAuth2Password Authentication | SAP Help Portal😞

  • The user used for the destination must be a valid user on Cloud Foundry environment and it must have the role SpaceDeveloper in the target space.

  • The user must be a platform user so that the deployment works for all content types. For more information, see Platform Users.

  • The user used for the destination isn’t subject to any Data Protection and Privacy requirements.

  • We recommend that you use a technical user to avoid constraints typically associated with personal users, such as password rotation.

If it should not work out, consider to switch the destination to using SAP Content Agent service instead of the deploy service, as described here: Creating Destinations Using SAP Content Agent Service | SAP Help Portal
This has the advantage that it is token-based, so no user/password is required.

Best regards,
Boris

entry.title: Principal propagation through AWS Application Load Balancer (ALB)
entry.content:
Hello,

Can you please help in answering the following questions.

  1. The prerequisites mention that for identity propagation, mutual authentication (mTLS) is mandatory, then how is the case 1 of SAP note 3482634 applicable when mtls is disabled on the load balancer.
  2. "As per SAP note 3482634, If SAP Cloud Connector version is lower than 2.17.0, we need to disable ECDHE, DHE ciphersuites using property jdk.tls.disabledAlgorithms in file $JAVA_HOME/jre/lib/security/java.security (on unix/linux). Can you please help me understand why this is required?" 

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Principal propagation through AWS Application Load Ba...
entry.content:
Hello,

Can you please help in answering the following questions.

  1. The prerequisites mention that for identity propagation, mutual authentication (mTLS) is mandatory, then how is the case 1 of SAP note 3482634 applicable when mtls is disabled on the load balancer.
  2. "As per SAP note 3482634, If SAP Cloud Connector version is lower than 2.17.0, we need to disable ECDHE, DHE ciphersuites using property jdk.tls.disabledAlgorithms in file $JAVA_HOME/jre/lib/security/java.security (on unix/linux). Can you please help me understand why this is required?"

entry.title: Re: Towards Test-Driven Development with SAP Process Integration Test Tool
entry.content:
Hi @anna_winterholler 

Now the same concept can be used with SAP Integration Suite programs: 

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/test-driven-development-for-sap-integration-suite-migrations-a-game-changer/ba-p/13973592

Best Regards,

Michal Krawczyk

entry.title: Are you looking for an overview of the SAP Integrated Business Planning for Supply Chain?
entry.content:
I  recommend to access our Discovering Response & Supply for SAP IBP – order-based planning learning journey.

Overview
In this course, you will explore the essential features and functionalities of the order-based planning business processes within SAP Integrated Business Planning (IBP) for response and supply. You will get an introduction, how to leverages historical and real-time order data to create accurate supply plans that are directly linked to customer orders and sales forecasts. This approach enables businesses to focus on fulfilling specific customer requirements, taking into account order priorities, inventory levels, lead times, and available supply resources.

Learning objectives
After completing this course, learners will be able to describe the key business processes and explain the the benefits of the order-based planning in the SAP Integrated Business Planning (IBP) for response and supply planning business application.

Prerequisites

  • Exploring Planning Processes in SAP IBP
  • Exploring the Tools and Features in SAP IBP
     

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area. 
Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you. 

I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: Rebate Amount Based on two Different Target Quantitie...
entry.content:
Hi @priya_sshekhar, 

The scenario you described involves a product mix condition for rebates, which is not supported out of the box by SAP CCM through standard configuration. Currently, SAP CCM allows for rebate conditions to be set up based on quantities, values, or scales for individual materials, but it does not natively support scenarios where rebates depend on a combination of conditions across multiple materials.

To address this requirement, you have the following options:

  1. Custom Development: This would involve developing custom logic to evaluate the combined conditions (e.g., checking the purchase quantity of Material A to determine eligibility and then applying the rebate for Material B accordingly). This custom logic can be integrated into the condition contract creation process or the settlement process.

  2. Manual Management: Alternatively, the eligibility and rebate criteria could be managed manually by validating the conditions before creating the condition contract or before executing the settlement process. While this avoids custom development, it requires additional manual effort and could increase the risk of errors.

If custom development is pursued, collaboration with an experienced SAP developer or consultant is recommended to ensure the solution integrates seamlessly with your existing CCM setup.

I hope this helps clarify your options.

Regards, 
Gauthier

entry.title: Re: Empty content in RESTCallResult for GET when using Ex...
entry.content:
Nevermind! I solved it on my own and the solution is:

The debugger "Locals" window did not show any result, but when I traced the information it was clearly shown in the "Output" window. Just lost one day on this...

entry.title: Issue with Automatic Deduction for Semi-Finished Goods Using Movement Type 531
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

I have a scenario where we are using the same material code (let's call it "1") as both a finished product and a semi-finished product according to its specification.

Here's the situation:

  • We want to automatically deduct a quantity of this material for another plant in CO15 using movement type 531.
  • In the specification, we assigned a special procurement type "70" to this material. However, we cannot set this in the material master because the material code is also used as a finished product.

Example:
If we confirm 10 pieces:

  • 5 pieces should be deducted for the other plant using movement type 531.
  • The remaining 5 pieces should be received at the production plant.

Problem:
Currently, SAP is receiving all 10 pieces at the production plant instead of deducting 5 for the other plant.

Question:
How can we configure this process so that SAP automatically deducts the quantity sent to the other plant during goods receipt?

Thank you in advance for your help!

entry.title: SAM2110 Synchronization Start Time Stamp
entry.content:
Hi,

Is there any standard tables, apart from the below provided table names, where the entire application synchronization start timestamp is updated.

/SYCLO/MDW01 – Open sync session and Close sync session timestamp is available.

CDHDR – The post transaction timestamp of each entity is available. 

So, kindly let us know if there is any standard table which captures the sync start time irrespective of with/without changes?

Thanks

Kiran

entry.title: Re: Consume a REST Service on Cloud Application Studio
entry.content: Nevermind! I solved it on my own and the solution is: The debugger "Locals" window did not show any result, but when I traced the information it was clearly shown in the "Output" window. Just lost one day on this...

entry.title: Not able to create goods issue with BAPI_GOODSMVT_CREATE with 351 mvt type
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

when I am trying to create goods issue using BAPI_GOODSMVT_CREATE with movement type 351 against STO (Stock transport order) and I am getting error message saying, 'Goods movement not possible with mvmt type 351'. kindly help me.

Code:

lwa_goodsmvt_header-pstng_date = '20250108'.
lwa_goodsmvt_header-doc_date = '20250108'.
*lwa_goodsmvt_header- = '70002413'.
st_goodsmvt_code-gm_code = '03'.

*Item data
lwa_goodsmvt_item-material = 'PB500145'.
lwa_goodsmvt_item-po_number = '70002413'.
lwa_goodsmvt_item-po_item = '00001'.
lwa_goodsmvt_item-entry_qnt = '1'.
lwa_goodsmvt_item-entry_uom = 'EA'.
* lwa_goodsmvt_item-batch = <lwa_itm>-charg.
lwa_goodsmvt_item-prod_date = '20250108'.
lwa_goodsmvt_item-move_type = '351'.
lwa_goodsmvt_item-plant = 'XXXX'. "Hiding plant
*lwa_goodsmvt_item-stge_loc = '0001'.
lwa_goodsmvt_item-mvt_ind = lc_b.
lwa_goodsmvt_item-stck_type = 'F'.
APPEND lwa_goodsmvt_item TO lt_goodsmvt_item.
CLEAR: lwa_goodsmvt_item.

CLEAR:lw_mblnr.

* BAPI for Post Goods Receipt
CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_GOODSMVT_CREATE'
EXPORTING
goodsmvt_header = lwa_goodsmvt_header
goodsmvt_code = st_goodsmvt_code
IMPORTING
materialdocument = lw_mblnr
TABLES
goodsmvt_item = lt_goodsmvt_item
return = lt_ret.

READ TABLE lt_ret INTO lwa_return WITH KEY type = lc_e.
IF sy-subrc EQ 0.

CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_TRANSACTION_ROLLBACK'.
lwa_return-type = lc_e.
APPEND lwa_return TO lt_return.
CLEAR: lwa_return.

ELSE.
* saving Goods issue
CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_TRANSACTION_COMMIT'
EXPORTING
wait = lc_x.

endif.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Configuring Automatic Performance Form Launch on Hiring and Rehiring

Regards

Aradhana

entry.title: Re: Goals Rating through hyperlink in VarPay form
entry.content:
Hi @Konstantina 

It's worst practice to do that but it is possible (I've built it for a customer before that insisted despite our warnings).

The only limitation is that the Performance and the Variable Pay forms must both be in the inbox of the person you want to be able to edit the goals ratings at the same time. 

See this presentation I made for the customer back in 2018 and that I anonymized.

All the best,
Xavier

entry.title: Re: Enable faster user changes and shared terminals using badges in SAP Digital Manufacturing

Prabhakar

entry.title: Re: Creating Custom Client IDs in SAP Document Informatio...
entry.content:
Hi Sundar,
As I stated in my last reply, you need to add the schema name only and not the field names. Please refer to the options I posted in my previous reply as an example.

options = {"schemaName":"Name of your schema","clientId":"your client id","documentType":"custom (the document type you used to create your schema)"}


Best Tobias

entry.title: Re: Able to get list all components while booking Non con...
entry.content: Hi @nehadwivedi, by design, only assembled components show up out of the box at the moment. Br, Manoel

entry.title: Re: (Re)using Master Operations in SAP Digital Manufacturing
entry.content:
Thanks @ManoelCosta, this topic is one of the most crucial things to understand and leverage in modelling the execution process, especially as it enables the reuse of assigned objects (Data Collection Groups, Equipment Set Points ...) and enables the setting of Resource Types and default Resources, which is a core prerequisite for using the Scheduling features (Resource Orchestration).

This is something I stress in every implementation and template I'm involved with.

entry.title: Communication Channel SAP_COM_0179 not available for activation to integrate Profit Center
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Currently, I am implementing SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud for one of our clients.

The client wants to create, change, and delete Profit Centers via API interface. To integrate the Profit Center, we need to activate the communication channel SAP_COM_0179 in the system.

However, during activation, we found that the communication channel SAP_COM_0179 is not available in the system.

I request input from all experts on how to resolve this issue.

entry.title: Re: Not able to create goods issue with BAPI_GOODSMVT_CRE...
entry.content:
Read first

  • FAQ 520813 - FAQ: BAPIs for goods movements 
  • How-To 2420247 - Goods Movement types - SAP ERP & SAP S/4 HANA
  • KBA 2689573 - Available business scenarios and their movement types - SAP ERP & SAP S/4HANA

for allowed codes and how to use them with this BAPI.

Usually I checked for the required code(s) in those two tables:

  • T158B "Check Table: Movement Type for Transaction Code" to find transactions allowed so correct gm_code to use in BAPI
  • T158G "MMIM: Possible Codes for BAPI Goods Movement" Else BAPI not allowed

entry.title: Re: Distance Metric - Best Matching Technician
entry.content: Thank you, I see the influence request in accepted status. Do you have a timeline of when the feature will be available? - Karthik

entry.title: Spanish User Group (AUSAPE) for Human Capital Management
entry.content:
The Spanish User Group for Human Capital Management (AUSAPE- Grupo de Trabajo de Recursos Humanos y Success Factors) offers regular meetings for customers and partners to support them on HCM topics.

We are inviting all members of the Spanish User Group to take part in the event on the 10th of January 2025!

Agenda:
10:00-10:15. Welcome.
10:15-11:00. Opentext will explain how to maximize the efficiency of Human Resources processes with AI and automation between SAP and OpenText.
11:00-12:30. Gema Moraleda (Localization Product Manager, SAP Globalization, SAP) will talk about the latest legal changes for the new year, annual reports, taxes, and Social Security.

You can find more information and the registration link here.

If you want to connect with SAP users and experts to exchange on HCM topics for Spain, join the Spanish Human Capital Management Localization collaboration group.

entry.title: Re: OData Batch call Operations
entry.content:

I have an application based on OData v4 Rap based service. I have to perform update as well as create operation in the application. I want to know if the ways specified by you are applicable for OData v4 service as well?

Thanks

entry.title: Re: SAP-CRM V7.13 (non-HANA): Divide data into 2 clients to support a carve out
entry.content: This would be similar to a “Clone and Migrate”-scenario. The idea is to clone client 100 into 200, adjust some customizing afterwards, like integration and connectivity. Then also cloning the orgmodel via SQL and some Business partners, like the org BuPas. These steps are also needed in a ”Clone and Migrate”-scenario. The point is how to get in the masterdata and transactional data most efficiently into the client 200 and I don’t see a reason why not simply changing the client ID for relevant records and running afterwards an update of LOGSYS to the linked ERP-client 200. Any experience or ideas about that?

entry.title: Re: How to send Email Notifications only on the Last Retry Attempt in SAP CI/IS when using AEM
entry.content: Thanks for the detailed blog

entry.title: How Can I Increase performance of Document Parameter Get And Put Request?
entry.content:
Hi, 

I am using sap bo rest api in c# application.

In this app, I am getting document parameters by id using below endpoint;

raylight/v1/documents/{documentId}/parameters

After receiving these parameters, I send a put request to the same endpoint. The payload of the put request includes the parameters from the get request. After making a get, I put again because the values ​​of some parameters are missing after the get request. Due to the size limit, I make a put request after the get to get all the values ​​of the parameters completely.

Sample code is below;

                var documentParametersXml = await _sapClient.GetDocumentParametersByIdAsync(documentId);
                var parsedParameters = ParseDocumentParameters(documentParametersXml);
                var updatePayload = CreateParametersPayload(parsedParameters);
                var updateResponseXml = await _sapCustomPortalClient.UpdateDocumentParametersAsync(documentId, updatePayload);
                return ParseDocumentParameters(updateResponseXml);

So, There is no problem for documents that do not contain many parameters and values, but if the document has many parameters, these get and put requests take a very long time. How can I fix the performance issue here?

entry.title: SAP Build Apps - Delete Item Persistent Storage
entry.content:
Hello

My first post on this forum so excuse me if I have posted to the wrong area...

I have user details saved to local storage called 'persistUser' which is a collection of five records (including user email, password, etc.).

I cannot figure out how to delete it.  I am having trouble navigating this site, so if there are existing solutions, would appreciate being pointed that way.  The only thing I have been able to find is some referencing to looping as I need to delete each record one at a time.

What is really confusing me is that I have the record collection set up with a field called 'key' which is what I am using to identy the record...but when I add logic such as 'Delete record' to the canvas, there is no obvious way I can enter this key so how does the flow know what record to delete?  Really something simple..but I have spend days getting no where...

Any help greatly appreciated.

SAP Build Apps

This will potentially exclude some steps but for my very little selection it seems to be working, I have included blanks (null) to included completed forms:

entry.title: Re: Inspection Lot XXXX for order XXXX does not have nece...
entry.content:
Hello @spartan0412 ,

As per your screenshot , inspection lot is having status as ORRQ - it means order record required

Check whether any open point from QM side, just like Open Quality Notifications against Inspection lot or QM stock in inspection.

Regarding ORRQ status, below link is useful to understand this point.

Solved: Process Order- ORRQ - SAP Community

All the best for next steps , ask me further queries🤗

entry.title: Re: Distance Metric - Best Matching Technician
entry.content: Currently, it is planned as part of our 2502 release. Please watch for the 2502 What's New communication and 2502 Release Demo invitation for final information.

entry.title: Re: Monitoring Integration Issues with the New “Issues Detected” Event in SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Hi,
great BLOG.
Just a short question regarding messages with status "RETRY":
As far as I understand SAP note 3397916 it is (was?) not possible to raise an event when messages are in status "RETRY". I guess that the note was not updated properly and is not uptodate,

 Is it now possible to raise an alert when message status is "RETRY"?

Thanks for an update and best regards,

Dirk

entry.title: Using Links to execute UI rules
entry.content:
Hi experts

I have UI built for  custom MDF, that is used in Onboarding Personal Data Collection.

I'm attempting to add a link. There are two types: "Open URL" and "Execute UI Rules". The "open URL" ones work fine, but the links I have added to execute a UI rules don't seem to trigger. I wonder if these type of inks are supported in ONB? 

Thanks

entry.title: Re: I am not able to assign Charactestics to a Combinatio...
entry.content:
Hi @papa261190,

you can use the app Manage Characteristic Catalog to add characteristics from sales context if you do not find them in the list already.

Regards,
Andreas

entry.title: Remove worker from S/4HANA Public Cloud tenant.
entry.content:
How to archive unnecessary worker created in our S/4HANA public cloud tenant.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Remove worker from S/4HANA Public Cloud tenant.
entry.content:
For Archiving Business Partner, follow the below steps -

1.Terminate the worker by setting the end date to the past.

2. Follow the ILM process to delete the BP - Archiving Business Partner Using CA_BUPA | SAP Help Portal

entry.title: Re: Using Links to execute UI rules
entry.content: It seems "Execute UI Rules" links may not be triggering as expected in your ONB personal data collection UI, while "Open URL" works fine. Ensure the UI rules are properly configured and activated. Check that the link syntax is correct and the user has the necessary permissions to execute the rules. If the issue persists, verify ONB documentation for any known issues or reach out to ONB support for further troubleshooting.

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to access T Code FBL1N/FBL5N with rest...
entry.content:
Have you tried a transaction variant?

 

1910030 - SHD0 - How to create a screen variant for enjoy transactions.

entry.title: Re: Please let me confirm the final submission deadline for the COF
entry.content: I would like to respond to you by January 10th, so please answer my questions.

entry.title: Are you ready for implementing SAP Convergent Charging for subscription and consumption management?
entry.content:
I  recommend to access our Implementing SAP Convergent Charging learning journey.

Overview
The course provides an overview of the features of SAP Convergent Charging for subscription and consumption management, in the context of the SAP Billing and Revenue Innovation Management (BRIM) solution. 
In this training you will learn how to design and implement price models for subscription and consumption products.
How to model usage fees and recurring fees with logical components, model allowances and bring the design objects together in charge plans and allowance plans, is covered as well.
In addition, the integration of SAP Convergent Charging with SAP Convergent Invoicing and SAP Subscription Order Management will be explained in an architecture overview.

Learning objectives
After completing this intermediate level learning journey, consultants will be able to explain the major functional features of SAP Convergent Charging.
You will understand technical concepts of the solution, starting from its overall technical architecture up to the positioning of the module with the larger SAP BRIM (Billing and Revenue Innovation Management) solution.
Also you will learn how to configure SAP Convergent Charging for typical rating/pricing and charging scenarios and undertake other potential implementation activities such as designing and modelling business cases and integration with other SAP modules of the SAP BRIM solution.

Prerequisites

Essential:

  • Basic understanding of subscription and consumption processes

Recommended:

  • BR230 BRIM Overview
 

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area. 
Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you. 

I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: Using Links to execute UI rules
entry.content: hi reyna789 , these checks were done prior to raising the question, so no, those are not the issues.

entry.title: Re: Distance Metric - Best Matching Technician
entry.content:
Hi! Thanks for your question. This will be part of the 2502 release. The distance information will be displayed based on the user locale selected in the FSM Shell application. No configuration will be required. More information can be found on our public road map: https://roadmaps.sap.com/board?PRODUCT=73554900100800002022&FT=AI&range=CURRENT-LAST#;INNO=E9C7B9C258B21EEFADC655F77E7D51F3.

Best regards,
Florian Glanzmann, Product Manager Semi- and Fully Automated Scheduling at SAP Field Service Management

entry.title: Re: Requesting for SAP FICO practice materials
entry.content: Hi Friends, Happy New year :), I'm requesting if any one have SAP FICO practice material please provide me, it will very help for me

entry.title: Re: Please let me confirm the final submission deadline for the COF
entry.content: Dear SAP We would like to have an answer to our customer by January 10, so please answer our questions. I am aware that on the timeline, the COF entry must be completed within 5 days of the contract. However, if there is a long period of time between the contract and the delivery of the environment, is it ok to count backwards from the time until the delivery of the environment to complete the CDear SAP

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori elements extension: upload Excel files to create new entries using building blocks
entry.content:
Thanks for highlighting the possibility for using macro:Field for uploading to streams.

When you write "we can now implement the upload functionality more efficiently", which release of SAPUI5 do you refer to? The latest version with a long-term maintenance date is 1.120. Are the enhancements you refer to available in this version? macro:Field was already available with 1.120.

With this approach, an action opens a dialog that has a button which one has to use to open the browser's file selection dialog. This gives a feeling of being a roundabout solution. Would it be possible to trigger the file selection dialog (browser's) directly from the action instead of opening a dialog from where the is file selection dialog has to be opened. To me, the FileUploader with OK, Cancel button appears more acceptable from this experience POV.

entry.title: Re: Requesting for SAP FICO practice materials

entry.title: Re: Please let me confirm the final submission deadline for the COF
entry.content: Dear SAP, I would like to respond to the customer by January 10th, so please answer my questions. I understand that the timeline dictates that the COF must be completed within 5 days of signing the contract. However, if there is a long period between signing the contract and handing over the environment, would it be okay to count backwards from the time of handing over the environment and then complete the COF entry? I resent it because the message didn't send properly.

entry.title: Re: New Book: Enterprise Architecture with SAP (SAP-PRESS)
entry.content:
Thank you for this early notification, I have purchased and am reading through it. I have been an EA for  20 years, Zachman certified but working mainly in TOGAF the past 12 years, The Open Group rocks. Very familiar with LeanIX and when I could have introduced it into my organizations, when not we have cribbed artifact styles. 😉

I am excited to see this global effort by SAP to fold in EA at its core, much like Oracle did when it adopted TOGAF many years ago, but here it is being integrated into the ecosystem at tool and methodology level, which is a game changer.

Thanks again

entry.title: Re: Spell checker built into browser - Web Dynpro Abap
entry.content: Hi, How to disable Spell check. So that it wont even show any error in Webdynpro Text edit.

entry.title: ArchiveLink Content Server: GET Command with Offset Range Exceeding Actual Total File Size
entry.content:
Hello Experts, and Happy New Year!

I’m not a SAP expert, but I am currently working on an integration between ArchiveLink and the ECM system I am developing by creating a custom Content Server for communication.


Since I am not a SAP expert, instead of creating the Content Server using ABAP code, I am building an HTTP API that runs on an API Gateway in AWS. But I am following SAP Content Server HTTP Interface specification to implement all the commands and logic.


Currently, I have implemented three commands: Test Connection, Create, and Get. So far, everything is working well; I am receiving the requests through my API and can see the data in the CloudWatch logs.
I am attempting to archive a document using the SARA transaction (SARA -> Storage System -> Store Files and Execute). However, the job is failing during the post-archiving validation saying The end of archive file XXX is corruptLooking to the logs with all requests on this job I found:

✔️ Create Command: The first command we received to store the file was successful, and I was able to locate the file stored on our end.

✔️ Get Command (offset range 0 - 4096 bytes):This request is also successful when we send only a portion of the beginning of the file to SAP; the validation passes in this case.

❌ Get Command (offset range 532108 - 1580683 bytes): This request fails because the end of the stored file does not match what SAP was expecting.Checking the total size of the file, which is 940596 bytes, it is less than the offset range of the second request. It seems that a part of the file is missing on our side. However, this is the total size of the file we received in the create command; we received it as a Multipart-FORM stream and stored it directly in S3, without applying any special treatment to the physical file.

I tested rolling back to the old Content Server (from IBM FileNet P8) to see if I would encounter the same error. But, using this Content Server, the file is successfully archived. This suggests that there is likely something wrong or missing in my Content Server implementation.Has anyone encountered a similar issue or knows what the problem might be? Perhaps I need to apply some special processing or transformation to the file I received before storing it.

entry.title: 1b6 Rebate Settlement in India
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

Please tell us whether we can use Rebate Settlement 1b6 for India in S4 HANA Public cloud?

entry.title: You are getting a 554.5.0.0 error in the email output
entry.content:
In the output history of a document you see the below error

554.5.0.0 Message rejected email address is not verified. The following identities failed the check in region EU Central XXXXXXX@xxxx.com.

 

This indicates that the sending Domain is not DKIM verified.

Please open a case and follow the DKIM Guideline below:

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/dkim-enablement-for-sender-domains-byd/ba-p/13531014

How to create the Case and what is  needed can also be seen here in the KBA:

https://me.sap.com/notes/3248167

Best regards

Didi

entry.title: What to do if a customer is unable to complete the COF entry.
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

I understand that the COF must be completed within 5 business days after the contract is signed. If the customer is unable to complete the COF due to circumstances, will there be any problems if the deadline passes? 

Will it just delay the delivery of the environment to the customer? Or will there be any contractual issues?

entry.title: Re: SAP HANA Service pack upgrade - High importance
entry.content:
Hi Prabhakar, 

1. Most of the time, there is no impact on your existing systems. Still, you can perform the upgrade in the sandbox /test system before starting the life landscapes.

2. Refer to the SCN link with same question

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/determine-impact-of-upgrade-to-s-4-hana-on-other-sap-systems/qaq-p/12669469

Regards

SS

entry.title: Re: NOW RELEASED: Upload and work with external files in SAP Cloud ALM for implementation
entry.content: we are working on those ... history should be coming in near future. Versioning is a bigger beast and will take some time!

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud: Issue with 000 period from ACDOCU table
entry.content:
Hello all,

We have created a query using data from the ACDOCU table in S/4HANA database and we noticed that the field FISCYEARPER shows a period equal to 000. This issue is causing our SAC Dashboard to reject all rows with a period of 000.

Steps to reproduce
Step 1: Create a new custom cds view using data from the ACDOCU table in S/4HANA database.
Step 2: Create a new model in SAC which based on the custom cds view from step 1.
Step 3:  The field FISCYEARPER shows a period equal to 000 which is rejecting all rows with a period of 000.

Do you have any idea how to deal with this?
Thank you in advance!

#sapanalyticscloud

entry.title: Re: Issue with Automatic Deduction for Semi-Finished Goods Using Movement Type 531
entry.content:
Hello @ps0410 ,

If I understood correctly, your requirement is following way.

You have FG & SFG in the process which are identical just like recursive BOM.

Now your expectation is that during prod order confirmation, you are expecting 5 PC to Prod Plant (currently all qty posting to this plant) and rest of 5 PC to other plant (Planning or supplying plant) using 531 movement type.

You have challenge for applying sp. procurement type -70 to this scenario?

entry.title: Error ID: 1470000192 - No es posible la cancelación de Nota de Credito
entry.content:
Error ID: 1470000192 - No es posible la cancelación. El abono abona total o parcialmente los anticipos que se arrastraron a la factura.

El error corresponde cuando quiero cancelar una nota de crédito vinculada a una factura que contiene anticipos aplicados.

Cancele el pago de la factura anticipo y el error persiste

Busque el ID interno de reconciliación de partidas pero no me permite cancelar puesto que la reconciliación se da con la creación de la nota de crédito

 

De que manera podría solucionar esto en SAP SQL vs. 10 FP2105

entry.title: Can I extend the self-registration for SAP Cloud Identity Services
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I want to enable the self-registration for an application registered in our SAP Cloud Identity Services tenant. Activating the self-registration and adding some information available in "User Attributes for Access" is fine and working.

But, we also want the user to enter the "Login name" (which we use as SSO attribute). Unfortunately, we cannot add this to the self-registration form. As we only allow internal users we could probably call an API to determine the Login name based on the email address as this would be available in a central repository.

How can ensure that the login name is set on self registration (either by entering in the according form or by some logic) before the first real login of the user?

entry.title: Possible to use different weights/ratings in PM Form per user type
entry.content:
Hi, 

Our client requested a very customized scenario, but I'm not sure it's possible (I actually think it will not be possible but I want to double check). 

They have 3 Objective Sections in the PM Template. Every section weight is used for the Overall Rating Calculation. But the section weight should be different depending on the user type. 

E.g., user from department A should have section weight 20% for a particular section, while user from department B should have section weight 30% for a particular section. 

I don't think this is possible? The only workaround I see, is that you create different PM forms per user type (in which the section weight is different). 

Thx a lot! 

Kind regards, 

Ellen

entry.title: Re: XREF1, XREF2, XREF3 in MIRO - the ultimate solution
entry.content: I used the above solution, and during testing, I noticed that the information entered in MIRO is transferred exclusively to the first line of the accounting entry — to the liabilities account. I would be more interested in having this information added to the cost account. Could we transfer this information to specific lines of the accounting entry based on predefined categories?

entry.title: Re: Calculate times in SAC
entry.content:
Hi Peter,

Did you find a solution or workaround for this?

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori elements extension: upload Excel files to create new entries using building blocks
entry.content:
Hi,
also with 1.120 we supported the file uploader when using a stream property and we already introduced the support of singletons, so yes you should be able to implement the same also with 1.120.

Regarding your second question, I understand your feedback, and I second you that omitting this dialog but showing the file selector dialog directly would be a better approach. Unfortunately, this is currently not supported. We don't yet allow adding a file uploader directly into the table action section, it has to be an action. If you place it above the table (by still using our field building block) you can omit the dialog - but I understand user would expect this action in the table toolbar.

Another option would be to use the table with the file uploader plugin:

https://ui5.sap.com/test-resources/sap/fe/core/fpmExplorer/index.html#/buildingBlocks/table/tableUpload

After clicking on upload, the file browser is shown immediately. But this plugin expects a stream property to exist in the entity type, and after selecting a file, a new instance is created and the file is put to the stream property of this newly created entity. This does not fit to your need as well.

The best solution would be to allow to add a file uploader into the action toolbar. This would be a new requirement for SAP Fiori elements for OData v4.

Best regards,
Marcel

entry.title: Re: Line Limit in Stories -SAC
entry.content: Try to Reduce the number of Cost centres or try to change the filters.

how do we process the remaining 25 documents which are not posted, please assist as it is impacting other invoices in production.

Regards

Jithendra Shivashankar

entry.title: Re: Not able to create goods issue with BAPI_GOODSMVT_CRE...

entry.title: Re: Video Data Story, a brand-new way of story telling in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Hi @roy_jin 

It seems like the access to the video is restricted. 

Best regards, 
Tim

entry.title: unique National Insurance (NI) number for each employee profile
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

We are facing an issue in Success Factors Employee Central (EC) where the system requires a unique National Insurance (NI) number for each employee profile. This prevents us from rehiring former employees with their original NI number and a new person-id-external (Employee ID). It also affects temporary or contract workers transitioning into permanent roles, as their NI number remains unchanged.

Our proposed solution is to allow the system to accept the same NI number for new employee profiles, as long as other unique identifiers (such as Employee ID) are different. We also want the NI number to be validated for format correctness but not treated as a unique identifier within the system.

We would like to understand how other organizations have handled this scenario. Have you encountered this issue, and if so, what solutions or workarounds have you implemented?

Looking forward to your insights and suggestions

entry.title: Re: SAP GUI for Windows Keyboard delay
entry.content:
Hi Frank,

As you mentioned some of the user's key inputs are delayed in SAPGUI 800, have you checked the end user's laptop or desktop for overall memory and CPU usage? Or are any other applications consuming excessive memory and CPU resources?

Regards

SS

entry.title: Re: Career shift from ABAP to AL/ML
entry.content:
This is my personal opinion, and all the paths are different. 

You can keep the ABAP experience and study at the same time AI/LM. 
I think in the future you will not program anymore AI/ML algorithm from scratch but you will only use API and service already made. 

1) ABAP will never left completely but yes, if you know only ABAP it's a problem for me. When you said that you have 18 years of experience in ABAP, do you know RAP? Do you know how to develop a CDS and oData service? For me for that it's fine right now. My suggestion is maybe look little bit on CAP maybe next step. 

2) About areas and modules, it's a big question. We have so much AI right now, but we have no use cases. And the use cases the customer wants SAP to cover it. Take a look on the Discovery site in the section AI, but this is more an architect and less developer. https://discovery-center.cloud.sap/ai-catalog/

3) My suggestion is yes. I mean, if you want to develop an AI workflow or a model, BTP has the tool to do it, and you should learn BTP. Right now, everything to project a new model can do in the SAP AI Core service: https://help.sap.com/docs/sap-ai-core?locale=en-US

4)

entry.title: Re: Inspection Lot XXXX for order XXXX does not have nece...
